member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Graph.GraphBuilder
member.summary: Orchestrates all resolvers to produce the final MvvmGraph.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Graph.MvvmGraph
member.summary: Immutable in-memory graph produced by GraphBuilder.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.IFileSystem
member.summary: File system abstraction to keep Core testable without touching real disk.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.RoslynContext
member.summary: Wraps a Roslyn and lazily caches per syntax tree. Thread-safe.

member.name: P:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.RoslynContext.Compilation
member.summary: The underlying Roslyn compilation.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.RoslynContext.GetSemanticModel(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.SyntaxTree)
member.summary: Returns a cached for the given syntax tree, creating it on first access. Safe to call from multiple threads.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.RoslynContext.GetAllNamedTypes
member.summary: Returns all named types in the compilation (across all namespaces, including nested types).

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.ViewModelClassifier
member.summary: Identifies which named types in a compilation are ViewModels, based on configured name suffixes and base types.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.ViewModelClassifier.IsViewModel(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns true when the given type should be treated as a ViewModel: concrete (non-abstract) class whose name ends with a configured suffix OR that inherits (directly or transitively) a configured base type.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.ViewModelClassifier.IsView(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when the type name ends with a configured view suffix.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlCommandBinding
member.summary: A Command="{Binding XxxCommand}" binding found in XAML.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlCommandBinding.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: A Command="{Binding XxxCommand}" binding found in XAML.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlDataContextInfo
member.summary:
A DataContext declaration found in a XAML file.
TypeName: The resolved ViewModel class name (e.g. "LoginViewModel").
ClrNamespace: The CLR namespace resolved from the xmlns alias (e.g. "MyApp.ViewModels").
Kind: How the DataContext was declared.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlDataContextInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.DataContextKind,System.Int32)
member.summary:
A DataContext declaration found in a XAML file.
TypeName: The resolved ViewModel class name (e.g. "LoginViewModel").
ClrNamespace: The CLR namespace resolved from the xmlns alias (e.g. "MyApp.ViewModels").
Kind: How the DataContext was declared.

member.name: F:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.DataContextKind.ExplicitElement
member.summary: <UserControl.DataContext><vm:Foo /></UserControl.DataContext>

member.name: F:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.DataContextKind.LocatorBinding
member.summary: DataContext="{Binding Foo, Source={StaticResource Locator}}"

member.name: F:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.DataContextKind.BindingPath
member.summary: DataContext="{Binding SomeChildVM}" — composition edge

member.name: F:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.DataContextKind.DesignTime
member.summary: d:DataContext — design-time only, ignored during analysis

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlDataTemplateInfo
member.summary: A DataTemplate with a DataType attribute.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlDataTemplateInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: A DataTemplate with a DataType attribute.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlDocument
member.summary:
Parsed representation of a XAML file.
XClass: The x:Class value, e.g. "MyApp.Views.LoginView".
RootElementType: The root element type (UserControl, Window, Page, etc.).
XmlnsMap: All xmlns prefix to CLR namespace mappings declared on the root element.
ChildControlTypeNames: Child UserControl/custom-element type references found as child elements.

Parsed representation of a XAML file.
XClass: The x:Class value, e.g. "MyApp.Views.LoginView".
RootElementType: The root element type (UserControl, Window, Page, etc.).
XmlnsMap: All xmlns prefix to CLR namespace mappings declared on the root element.
ChildControlTypeNames: Child UserControl/custom-element type references found as child elements.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlParser
member.summary: Parses a XAML file and extracts DataContext declarations, command bindings, data templates, and child control references.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlParser.TryParse(System.String)
member.summary: Tries to parse the given XAML file path. Returns null on error.

member.name: M:MvvmMapper.Core.Parsing.XamlParser.Parse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses XAML content string directly (useful for testing without file I/O).
